title: Recheck the orders to make sure nothing was missed.

events.text: [br0.015]That's right. Surgeons complete postop orders that usually include[br4.413][br4.494]all the medications, procedures, and care needed after surgery.[br8.416][br8.562]In this case with a client who is NPO, we want to make sure[br11.888][br11.969]insulin is being administered exactly as outlined in the orders.[br15.578]
